name: pandastack
description: Personal AI operator OS for Claude Code. Skill-only (no agents, no commands), 48 skills tiered as 35 core / 5 ext / 8 personal via plugins/pandastack/manifest.toml. 7 lifecycle flows, 5 scenario flow commands (sprint / office-hours / boardroom / dojo / retro), 5 persona skills (ceo + 4 -lead). Covers dev / knowledge / writing / work / research / retro / decision lifecycles.
